name: Chris
goal: He wants to find a luxurious beach resort that fits his budget and can accommodate all his friends for an unforgettable celebration of his academic achievement.
backstory: Chris has just finished his studies and is eager to celebrate with his friends, having always dreamed of taking a well-deserved break after years of hard work. He's particularly fond of beach destinations, having spent a memorable summer vacation in Bali during his gap year. This holiday is meant to be a special treat for himself and his closest friends.

focus_notes.cost: For Chris, cost focus means finding a balance between luxury and affordability, ensuring that the holiday is special without being overly expensive for any of his friends.
focus_notes.comfort: Comfort focus for Chris involves choosing accommodations and activities that cater to everyone's needs, prioritizing relaxation and enjoyment over adventure or extreme experiences.
focus_notes.time: Time focus means selecting a destination that can be reached fairly quickly and offers enough time for relaxation and exploration without feeling rushed, considering the limited holiday period they have.
focus_notes.safety: Safety focus is about picking a location with low risk of political unrest, health concerns, or crime, ensuring that all his friends feel secure throughout their trip.
focus_notes.flexibility_focus: Flexibility means being open to changing plans if something better comes up during the discussion, such as discovering a hidden gem of a destination or an exciting activity that wasn't initially considered.
